_about: Hardware drill-pattern catalog. Coordinates are face-local in mm: du = along the face's u axis, dv = along its v axis, measured from the anchor point you pass to drill_for_hardware. These are STANDARD industry patterns (35 mm system, System 32) seeded from public specs — always verify against the exact SKU's spec sheet. Manufacturers' proprietary 3D models are NOT bundled (licensing); add your own exact entries to ~/.claudecad/hardware.json (same schema under a 'hardware' list).

hardware.name: Concealed hinge cup — 35 mm system
hardware.datum: cup centre on the door's inner face
hardware.notes: Universal 35 mm cup. Cup-centre setback from the door edge is typically 3-6 mm of edge-to-cup gap (~21-24 mm edge-to-centre for full overlay); confirm with the hinge's boring chart. Mounting screws are placed per the hinge template (omitted here).

hardware.name: Hinge mounting-plate screw pair (System 32)
hardware.datum: midpoint between the two screw holes on the cabinet side
hardware.notes: Cabinet-side mounting plate fixes on the 32 mm system line; the two screws sit 32 mm apart vertically. Pilot 4 mm unless your screws differ.

hardware.name: Shelf-pin bore — 5 mm (System 32)
hardware.notes: Single 5 mm bore for a shelf pin. For a column, repeat at 32 mm pitch with a 37 mm front setback (System 32) — use drill_holes_on_face for the row, or add a multi-hole entry.

hardware.name: Cam-housing bore — 15 mm
hardware.notes: 15 mm housing bore in the face; pairs with an 8 mm dowel/bolt on the mating panel (drilled separately). Standard offset from the panel edge ~9.5 mm to bore centre; verify for the exact bolt length.

hardware.name: Dowel bore — 8 mm
hardware.notes: Standard 8 mm dowel bore, 12 mm deep (panel face) — pair across mating parts.

hardware.name: Bar handle — 128 mm centres
hardware.datum: midpoint between the two screw holes
hardware.notes: Two through-holes for M4 handle screws at 128 mm centre-to-centre (common pitches: 96 / 128 / 160). Through-drilled; set depth to the door thickness or leave through-all.

hardware.name: Drawer-slide cabinet-member fixing pair (System 32)
hardware.notes: Approximate cabinet-member fixing on the 32 mm line: front hole at the datum, rear hole 32 mm back along u. 4 mm pilots. Exact hole positions vary by slide model — verify against the slide's drilling diagram.
